# `utilities` — utilities templates

**Industry:** Cross-industry (residential/commercial)  ·  **Templates:** 3

Phishing templates impersonating utility companies using disconnection fear and credit lures

Phishing-simulation templates for **authorized** security awareness training with [GoPhish](https://getgophish.com/) and [HailBytes SAT](https://hailbytes.com/sat?utm_source=github&utm_medium=folder_readme&utm_campaign=gophish-training-templates). See the [repository README](../README.md) for setup and the [full template catalog](../docs/CATALOG.md) for every category at a glance.

## Templates

| Template | File | Attack vector | Difficulty | Est. click rate |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Power Outage Credit Notice | [`power_outage_credit.html`](power_outage_credit.html) | credential_harvest | beginner | 40-60% |

| Utility – Service Disconnection Notice | [`service_disconnection_notice.html`](service_disconnection_notice.html) | credential_harvest | intermediate | 40-60% |

## Template details

### Power Outage Credit Notice

- **File:** [`power_outage_credit.html`](power_outage_credit.html)
- **Attack vector:** credential_harvest · **Difficulty:** beginner · **Est. click rate:** 40-60%
- **GoPhish variables:** `{{.FirstName}}` `{{.Email}}` `{{.URL}}` `{{.Tracker}}`
- **Paired training page:** [`education/utilities_education.html`](education/utilities_education.html)
- **Suggested subject lines:**
  - Power outage credit available on your account — claim now
  - Your utility credit is waiting — verify your account
  - Account credit notification: $45.20 applied to your balance
- **Operator notes:** Credit/refund lure is highly effective — people don't want to miss free money. Works in areas with known utility outages.

### Utility – Autopay Payment Failed

- **File:** [`autopay_failed.html`](autopay_failed.html)
- **Attack vector:** credential_harvest · **Difficulty:** beginner · **Est. click rate:** 35-55%
- **GoPhish variables:** `{{.FirstName}}` `{{.Email}}` `{{.URL}}` `{{.Tracker}}`
- **Paired training page:** [`education/utilities_education.html`](education/utilities_education.html)
- **Suggested subject lines:**
  - Autopay failed - update your billing information
  - Action required: your automatic payment was declined
  - We couldn't process your utility payment
- **Operator notes:** Autopay-failure billing lure. Universally relatable; good beginner-level test for the general population.

### Utility – Service Disconnection Notice

- **File:** [`service_disconnection_notice.html`](service_disconnection_notice.html)
- **Attack vector:** credential_harvest · **Difficulty:** intermediate · **Est. click rate:** 40-60%
- **GoPhish variables:** `{{.FirstName}}` `{{.Email}}` `{{.URL}}` `{{.Tracker}}`
- **Paired training page:** [`education/utilities_education.html`](education/utilities_education.html)
- **Suggested subject lines:**
  - Final notice: scheduled service disconnection
  - Action required to avoid service interruption
  - Your service is scheduled for disconnection
- **Operator notes:** Disconnection-threat lure raises urgency over the autopay template. Use sparingly; high-pressure scenario.

## How to use

1. In GoPhish, go to **Email Templates → New Template** and paste the HTML from the file above. Set a subject line from the suggestions.
2. Create a **Landing Page** (see [`../landing-pages/`](../landing-pages/)) to capture the click, and — where a training page is listed — redirect clickers to it so they get immediate education.
3. Configure a realistic **Sending Profile** and launch to a consented, in-scope group. Schedule during business hours for realism.

> **Before sending:** customize sender names, domains, logos, and any brand impersonations to match your engagement and your authorization scope. These templates are for authorized training only.
